CREATE TABLE jsons( `json` String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT simpleJSONExtractUInt(json, 'qux') FROM jsons WHERE simpleJSONHas(json, 'qux') = 1;
SELECT simpleJSONExtractInt(json, 'bar') FROM jsons ORDER BY json;
CREATE TABLE jsons2( `json` String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT simpleJSONExtractUInt(json, 'foo') FROM jsons2 UNION SELECT simpleJSONExtractUInt(json, 'baz') FROM jsons2;
SELECT simpleJSONExtractInt(json, 'foo') as foo_value, simpleJSONExtractFloat(json, 'foo') as float_value FROM jsons2 WHERE simpleJSONHas(json, 'foo') = 1 LIMIT 1;
SELECT jsons.json, jsons2.json FROM jsons JOIN jsons2 ON simpleJSONExtractBool(jsons2.json, 'baz') = 0 WHERE simpleJSONHas(jsons.json, 'foo') = 1;
SELECT simpleJSONExtractRaw(json, 'nested.foo') FROM jsons WHERE simpleJSONHas(json, 'nested') = 1;
SELECT jsons2.json FROM jsons2 WHERE simpleJSONHas(json, 'foo') = 1 AND simpleJSONExtractBool(json, 'baz') = 0;
